text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Monday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, March 17. You have design sync with Sarah at noon, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. That sounds critical. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that took Lily to her medical checkup. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. That's good medical feedback. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Toddlers are full of energy. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. Great update. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick log: Reviewing our household budget today. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. Refinancing is a great leverage point. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. Our Twilio integration is throwing 503 rate limit errors during signups. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! That is a common bottleneck. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. Greg Holloway wants to drop billing integration to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Here is what I recommend. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of billing integration now and iterating later is a good compromise. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Took Lily to her medical checkup. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. Staying active is key. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Screen time is always a negotiation. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. That's wonderful. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick log: Looking over our mortgage options. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. I can run some projections for you. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, Researching rover power systems in depth. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. Mentoring Anika Patel on how to handle Q4 planning tradeoffs with Greg. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Understood. Encourage her to lead the next tradeoff discussion. It's a great growth opportunity for a junior PM. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. CareConnect prep is moving along. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
